author: ragetrip
description: Multi playlist-based audio player — folder & link playlists, mini-player, shuffle, repeat, fade-out. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Ragetrip
manifest.description: Create playlists from folders, files, or external links. Tab view + footer controls. Hotlink support
manifest.name: Audio PlugList

releases.author: ragetrip
releases.description:
### 1.3.2 - Release Notes
- Edits to comply with **Community Plugin** submission standards.
- Added **EQ** support for folder based playlists. Includes multiple presets plus a bypass option.
- Updated **Ribbon/Tab Icon**.
- Various bug cleanup.
    - Dynamic title lock-up addressed.
    - Footer player not updating current playlist on tab change addressed.
    - Icon and pill adjustments for tablet users.
releases.name: Audio PlugList 1.3.2

releases.author: ragetrip
releases.description:
# v1.2.6 — Hotkeys available by default, clearer dropdowns, re-scan buttons added, and YouTube -nocookie for stability

## Highlights
- **Per-playlist hotkeys**: Each playlist now registers a command in Obsidian Hotkeys by default  
   - (`Toggle Play/Pause - <Playlist Name>`; bindings persist across edits)
- **Dropdown clarity**: Added 📂 (folder) and 🔗 (link) markers to playlist dropdowns (footer + tab view)
- **Re-scan buttons**: 
  - **Re-scan playlists (All)** from settings is now available next to the drop down in tab view
  - **Re-scan playlist (Single)** button next to “Optional: Open In Browser” for link based playlists in the tab view
- **YouTube privacy/stability**: Embeds now use the **`youtube-nocookie.com`** endpoint for a more stable, privacy-friendly experience

## Fixes
- **Cross-player bleed**: Switching playlists between **Footer ↔ Tab** now stops whatever was playing (local `<audio>` or link embed), so only the active selection continues
- Minor UI polish on the footer mini-player pills so Shuffle/Repeat feel balanced
releases.name: Audio PlugList 1.2.6

releases.author: ragetrip
releases.description:
# 🎵 Audio Pluglist 1.2.5  

*A customizable audio playlist manager for Obsidian.*  
Supports local files, YouTube, Spotify, SoundCloud, and Deezer, with a built-in footer player and tab view. 


---

## 🎶 Features
- Manage multiple playlists inside Obsidian.  
- Add audio from:  
  - 📂 Local vault files (`.mp3`, `.wav`, `.flac`, etc.)  
  - ▶️ YouTube playlists or single tracks
  - 🎧 Spotify playlists (30s preview without Premium)  
  - 🌐 SoundCloud playlists (login supported) 
  - 🎶 Deezer playlists (login supported)
- Footer mini player with Shuffle, Repeat, and Stop.  
- Full tab view for library playlist browsing.  
- **Add playlist from link** for quick external embeds. 

---

## ✨ What’s New With v1.2.5
- ▶️ **External link** playlists or single track support.
- 🎯 **Repeat pill alignment** - now matches Shuffle in the footer player.  
- 🔊 **SoundCloud embeds** - auto-converts page links to the official widget for reliability.  
- 🧹 **Polish & cleanup** - link playlist sizes adjusted and minor cleanup.  

---

## 📥 Install
1. Download the attached **`audio-pluglist-1.2.5.zip`**.  
2. Unzip into your vault at:  
   ```bash
   .obsidian/plugins/audio-pluglist/
releases.name: Audio Pluglist 1.2.5

releases.author: ragetrip
releases.description:
## Audio PlugList 1.0.3

**Initial public release** 🎉

### Highlights
- Folder & Link playlists (auto-index or single direct URL)
- Footer mini-player with controls & “Now Playing” marquee
- Shuffle (off/all/one) & Repeat
- Fade-out on Stop (custom duration)
- Optional Artist / Album columns
- Quick re-scan tools and filename parser (`Artist - Title`)

### Install
See the README for manual install or BRAT steps.
releases.name: Audio PlugList 1.0.3
